---
name: artifact-data-management
description: Model plan, design, test, log, and validation artifacts with consistent schemas, ownership, and versioning.
---

## Purpose
Keep workflow artifacts structured, versioned, and traceable.

## When to use
- When defining artifact formats or file ownership.
- When updating plan, log, or traceability files.
- When output lineage must be preserved.

## Do
1. Treat artifacts as contracts.
2. Keep schemas and file ownership explicit.
3. Preserve version history and provenance.
4. Avoid unstructured or duplicated records.
